member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Sample.Full.AppDbContext
member.summary: Application DbContext — derives from so that all SimpleAuth tables are created alongside any application-specific tables.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Sample.Full.AppDbContextFactory
member.summary: Allows the EF Core tooling (dotnet ef migrations add) to instantiate at design time without running the application.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
